goal: Trim agents to ultra-lean teammates, delete surplus agents, update bridge for ID-based context, delete docs/skills.md

tasks.name: Rewrite implementer.md and debugger.md (ultra-lean)
tasks.action: Rewrite both agents to ~35 lines: role + cycle + rules. Add maxTurns: 30. Remove memory: project and Memory Engine Integration boilerplate.

tasks.name: Delete surplus agent files and docs/skills.md
tasks.action: Delete all 9 surplus agent files and docs/skills.md. .claude/agents/ should contain exactly implementer.md and debugger.md.

tasks.name: Update bridge.py for ID-based context passing
tasks.action: Remove context_snippet parameter, _load_context_snippet(), _extract_sections(), _CONTEXT_MAX_LINES. Simplify generate_implement_prompt() to ~30-line output with memory ID reference instead of embedded context.
verify: python3 -c "from scripts.memory.bridge import generate_implement_prompt; p=generate_implement_prompt(task_name='Test', action='Do', files=['f.py'], verify=['pytest'], memory_id='cn-abc123'); assert len(p.strip().split(chr(10))) < 40; print('OK')"

commitMessage: refactor(agent-architecture): restructure agents — ultra-lean teammates, skills migration
